description_long: This object consists of a rectangular cigarette box with a red top and white lower section, featuring a single cigarette partially protruding from the side. The front of the box displays the word 'Placebo' in bold white letters on the red section, and a label reading 'Smoking Blows' on the white section below. The cigarette itself is white with a tan filter and a brown tip, suggesting it is unused. The box is angular with a flat base and a slanted top, typical of hard cigarette packaging. The materials appear to be primarily cardboard for the box and paper with a filter for the cigarette. The overall appearance is clean and stylized, with minimal surface detail and a matte finish.
description: A rectangular red-and-white cigarette box labeled 'Placebo' with a single white cigarette with a tan filter protruding from the side. The box has a bold 'Smoking Blows' label and a clean, matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red top and white bottom of the box, with a cigarette sticking out from the right side.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'Placebo' brand and 'Smoking Blows' label, with the cigarette angled toward the viewer.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain red and white box with no visible text or cigarette.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the cigarette protruding from the left, showing the box's red top and white bottom.
attribute_brand_logo: The front of the box displays the text 'Placebo' and 'Smoking Blows', but no specific brand logo or emblem.
